queries.question: List all blockbusters and also list indie films that were screened at Sundance.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies
WHERE Movies.Genre = "Blockbuster" OR Movies.Genre = "Indie Film" AND Movies.FilmFestival = "Sundance Film Festival"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?movies p:FilmFestival ?filmfestival_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Blockbuster" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Indie Film" && STR(?filmfestival_w) = "Sundance Film Festival")))
}

queries.question: What blockbusters were screened at Sundance and what indie films were also screened there?
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies
WHERE (Movies.Genre = "Blockbuster" OR Movies.Genre = "Indie Film") AND Movies.FilmFestival = "Sundance Film Festival"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?movies p:FilmFestival ?filmfestival_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Blockbuster" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Indie Film")) && STR(?filmfestival_w) = "Sundance Film Festival"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show blockbusters and indie films that were screened at Sundance.
